title: Word Frequency
description: Đọc file text qua stdin. In mỗi từ (chữ thường) kèm tần suất, sắp xếp giảm dần theo freq rồi tăng dần theo từ nếu freq bằng nhau.

examples.input: the day is sunny the the the sunny is is

approach: tr -s ' ' '\n' | sort | uniq -c | sort -nr | awk in chuẩn LeetCode (word trước count).
memoryTip: Word freq shell = tr/sort/uniq -c/sort -nr/awk flip columns.

solutions.python:
# Bash
# cat words.txt | tr -s ' ' '\n' | sort | uniq -c | sort -nr | awk '{print $2,$1}'
solutions.cpp:
// Bash one-liner:
// cat words.txt | tr -s ' ' '\n' | sort | uniq -c | sort -nr | awk '{print $2,$1}'
solutions.c: /* Bash: cat words.txt | tr -s ' ' '\n' | sort | uniq -c | sort -nr | awk '{print $2,$1}' */

analysis.correctness: Pipeline chuẩn Unix đếm và sort đúng tie-break lexical.
